title: 11 Herbal Creams to Help Copd Patients with Wheezing
description: Salvia officinalis creams may help with wheezing due to the presence of certain compounds like thymol, carnosic acid, and ursolic acid. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate wheezing symptoms. Thymol, in particular, is known for its bronchodilatory effects, meaning it can help relax and widen airway muscles, making it easier to breathe.
